zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Staunton於大約1440年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，他的父親William Thomas De Staunton41歲，母親Millicent Mering32歲。他於大約1468年與Alice Knight在英國結婚。他去世於1518年1月9日在他的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Staunton was born about 1440, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, William Thomas De Staunton, was 41 and his mother, Millicent Mering, was 32. He married Alice Knight about 1468, in England. He died on 9 January 1518, in his hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Staunton est né environ 1440, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Thomas De Staunton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Millicent Mering, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice Knight environ 1468, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1518, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Staunton um 1440 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Thomas De Staunton 41 und seine Mutter Millicent Mering 32. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Stauntonが約1440年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父William Thomas De Stauntonは41歳，母Millicent Meringは32歳であった。約1468年にイギリスでAlice Knightと結婚した。彼は1518年1月9日に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Staunton(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Thomas De Staunton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Millicent Mering(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1468년 영국에서 Alice Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1518년 1월 9일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Staunton родился около 1440 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Thomas De Staunton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Millicent Mering, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Knight около 1468 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 9 января 1518 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
